meanings.definition: make a strenuous or labored effort
examples: She struggled for years to survive without welfare

meanings.definition: to exert strenuous effort against opposition
examples: he struggled to get free from the rope

meanings.definition: climb awkwardly, as if by scrambling
be engaged in a fight; carry on a fight
examples: Militant groups are contending for control of the country

meanings.definition: engaged in a struggle to overcome especially poverty or obscurity
